title: Brazilian-Style Stir-Fried Noodles
description: Quick and easy stir-fry recipe using vermicelli noodles and a blend of Brazilian-inspired flavors.

ingredients.name: Stir
ingredients.notes: Use a stir-fry sauce or make your own

ingredients.name: Brazilian
ingredients.notes: Cachaça or lime juice for an authentic taste

ingredients.name: Sour
ingredients.notes: Sour cream or a squeeze of lime juice

instructions: Cook the vermicelli noodles according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat the fry over medium-high heat.
Add the stir and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the Brazilian and sour, and stir to combine.
Add the cooked noodles to the skillet and toss everything together.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the noodles are well coated.
Stir in the fluffy rice and season with salt and pepper to taste.
